message:
feat(fcp-core): expand CLI connector management, mesh sessions, and registry

fcp-cli connector module (mod.rs, types.rs):
  Add comprehensive connector lifecycle management: list, inspect,
  enable/disable, and configure connectors via the CLI. The types module
  gains richer status representations and configuration validation.

fcp-host discovery (discovery.rs):
  Refine peer discovery with improved multicast handling and timeout
  logic for LAN-based connector enumeration.

fcp-mesh session (session.rs):
  Add session state tracking, graceful teardown, and reconnection
  support for mesh network sessions between federated connectors.

fcp-registry (lib.rs):
  Extend the connector registry with versioned capability lookups and
  compatibility checks for cross-version connector interop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
